title: Error executing pytest command in Execute Command node
symptom: When attempting to run 'python -m pytest' in the Execute Command node, n8n throws a NodeOperationError indicating the command failed.
not_this_if: Command runs successfully in the Docker container directly
root_cause: The Execute Command node may not handle the output of the pytest command correctly, leading to a failure when trying to execute it directly. This can happen due to how command outputs are processed in the node's execution context.
fix_steps: Modify the command to capture the output: 'test_results=$(python -m pytest)'
Add 'echo $test_results' to output the results correctly.
agent_instruction: Change the command in the Execute Command node to capture and echo the results.
